error.unexpectedError: We're sorry, but something unexpected happened. Please try again.
error.persistsContact: If this problem persists, please contact support.

notFoundPage.title: Page Not Found
notFoundPage.description: The page you're looking for seems to have wandered off to Mount Olympus. Let's get you back on track!

preSession.title: Exercise Practice
preSession.subtitle: Review and practice exercises from your situations

empty.title: No exercises available
empty.description: Complete some situations first, then come back to practice.

error.title: Unable to load exercises
error.description: We couldn't check your exercise queue. Please try again.

session.allCaughtUpDescription: You've completed all available exercises. Check back later for more.

exitDialog.title: Leave Practice?
exitDialog.description: Your progress in this session will be lost.

progress.title: Your Progress
progress.error: Failed to load metrics. Please try refreshing the page.
progress.empty: No progress data yet. Start studying to see your metrics!

news.title: Cyprus News To Learn And Practice

welcome.cardsToReview: You have {{count}} cards to review today.
welcome.cardsToReviewText: You have {{count}} cards to review today.

page.title: Cyprus News
page.subtitle: Practice reading with real news articles

empty.title: No news articles yet
empty.description: Check back later for new content to practice with

error.title: Unable to load news
error.description: We couldn't load the news articles. Please try again.

empty.title: No situations found
empty.description: Try adjusting your search or filters.

error.title: Failed to load situations
error.description: Something went wrong while loading situations.

empty.title: No exercises yet
empty.description: Exercises for this situation haven't been created yet.

page.title: What's New
page.subtitle: See the latest updates and improvements to Greeklish

empty.title: No updates yet
empty.description: Check back later for news and updates

success.title: Welcome to Premium!
success.description: Your subscription is active. Enjoy unlimited access to all decks and features.

navigation.title: Navigate Your Learning
navigation.description: Use this menu to access vocabulary decks, practice exercises, your progress, and more. Everything you need is here.

progress.title: Track Your Progress
progress.description: These metrics show your learning at a glance — cards due today, your current streak, mastered words, and total study time.

news_section.title: Cyprus News To Learn And Practice
news_section.description: Real news from Cyprus and Greece, simplified for language learners. Read, listen, and build vocabulary with current events.

news_country.title: Filter by Country
news_country.description: Filter news by country — focus on Cyprus, Greece, or world news depending on your interests.

news_difficulty.title: Choose Your Level
news_difficulty.description: Switch between A2 (simpler) and B2 (advanced) versions of the same article. Start with A2 and progress to B2 as you improve.

news_card.title: Read Real Greek News
news_card.description: Click any article to read it on the original news site — practice reading real Greek in context. Each card shows a summary to help you decide what to read.

news_all.title: Explore All News
news_all.description: See all available articles here, or find them anytime under Practice → News in the top menu.

decks_dropdown.title: Browse Your Decks
decks_dropdown.description: Open the Decks menu to see your options. Public Decks contains community-created vocabulary sets ready to use.

deck_filters.title: Find the Right Deck
deck_filters.description: Use filters to search by name, category, or level. Find exactly the deck that matches your current learning goals.

vocab_deck.title: Start with Vocabulary
vocab_deck.description: This vocabulary deck covers essential Greek nouns — a great place to start building your foundation. Click any deck to begin learning.

dismiss.title: Skip the tour?
dismiss.description: You can always restart it from the navigation bar.

complete.title: You're all set!
complete.description: You've seen what Greeklish has to offer. Start building your Greek vocabulary, practice for the culture exam, or read the latest news — all included in your 14-day trial.
